Off Calendar Dec-13-2004 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Mar-01-05 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by jury.

Appearances:
SANFORD CIPINKO, Esq. on behalf of plaintiff Victor Hernandez
WILLIAM BAUMGAERTNER, Esq. on behalf of defendant R.M. Harris and Co.

After this matter was sent to Judge Pro Tem, this matter settled. Terms of the settlement are as follows: Defendant to pay plaintiff the gross sum of 1.5 million dollars. Each side to bear their own costs and attorney fees. This is a structured settlement that will be completed in approximately 45-60 days.
